page: Amazon Web Services c6in.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 96 vCPUs and 48 physical cores based on the Intel Xeon 8375C processor with x86_64 architecture. The dedicated CPUs operate at a clock speed of 3.5 GHz, supported by a 54 MB L3 cache. The system includes 192.0 GB of DDR4 memory running at 3 GHz, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. No local storage or GPUs are bundled with this instance type.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core performance, placing the instance in the top 25% for multi-core CPU stress tests, Passmark CPU scores, and Geekbench multi-core evaluations. Single-core performance remains in the middle 50%. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and hardware-accelerated cryptography, resulting in top-tier performance in CPU encryption benchmarks. Memory bandwidth is also highly rated, with uncached large-block reads reaching 326.86 GB/sec.

Equipped with a baseline network bandwidth of 150 Gbps, the c6in.24xlarge is optimized for network-intensive and EBS-reliant workloads. It demonstrates strong capabilities in static web serving and high-throughput database operations, executing 91.29 million Redis SET operations per second. The instance is suited for compute-heavy tasks, network appliances, distributed analytics, and medium-scale LLM prompt processing, where its high network throughput and multi-threaded processing power offset the lack of local storage.
description: Amazon Web Services c6in.24xlarge is a compute-optimized, network-optimized instance featuring 96 vCPUs and 48 physical Intel Xeon 8375C cores running at 3.5 GHz on the Nitro hypervisor. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of DDR4 memory, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio, with no local storage or GPUs. The x86_64 architecture supports AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration, contributing to top-tier encryption performance and strong multi-core benchmark results. With a baseline network bandwidth of 150 Gbps, this instance delivers high memory bandwidth and exceptional network throughput. It is highly suited for network-intensive applications, multi-threaded compute workloads, static web serving, and high-throughput database operations.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c6in.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 192 GB DDR4 RAM, and 150 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-throughput network and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services c6in.24xlarge features 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and 150 Gbps bandwidth for compute and network-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-bandwidth, compute-optimized platform featuring ninety-six dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and exceptional multi-core processing capabilities for network-heavy workloads.

192.0 GB of DDR4 memory providing 2.0 GB per core
150 Gbps baseline network bandwidth optimized for EBS and network traffic
Strong multi-core CPU and high-speed memory bandwidth benchmark performance
